stem: The graph of 7x - 8y = 15 is translated down 6 units in the xy-plane. What is the x-coordinate of the x-intercept of the resulting graph?
rationale: Solving 7x - 8y = 15 for y: y = (7/8)x - 15/8. Translating down 6 units gives y = (7/8)x - 15/8 - 6 = (7/8)x - 63/8. Setting y = 0: (7/8)x = 63/8, so x = 9. The x-coordinate of the x-intercept is 9.
